title: Code Faster: AI as Your Co-Pilot
modules: Meet the AI That Writes Code
Debug It, Don't Just Accept It
synopsis: You're a developer on a deadline and an AI coding assistant just offered to write your entire program — this story puts you in the driver's seat of decisions about when to use it, when to override it, and how to actually understand what it produces. You'll finish with a working mini-project and a sharp sense of what AI coding tools can and can't replace.
rationale: AI coding assistants are reshaping what it means to learn programming, and students who understand how to collaborate with — rather than blindly rely on — these tools will have a decisive advantage in every technical field.
learning_outcome: Students can use an AI coding assistant to accelerate a real coding task, identify and correct errors in AI-generated code, and explain the difference between using AI as a learning scaffold versus a shortcut.
source_signals: Show HN: I quit coding years ago. AI brought me back
Show HN: PickCode – An educational coding environment for students after Scratch
